61.reason: Error: The category code for ">=" should be "GEQ", but it is incorrectly mapped to "EQL" (which is for "=="). This will cause the lexer to output the wrong token type for ">=".

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The name should be ">=" instead of "=="; this causes the lexical analyzer to incorrectly identify the ">=" token as "EQL" and output the wrong symbol.
